steps.title: Compute the mean of data set X
steps.content: Data set X is $5,9,9,13$. Its sum is $36$, so its mean is $$\frac{36}{4}=9$$

steps.title: Compute the mean of data set Y
steps.content: Data set Y has the same four values plus $27$, so its sum is $36+27=63$. Its mean is $$\frac{63}{5}=12.6$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Since $9\lt 12.6$, the mean of data set X is less than the mean of data set Y. The result matches.
